notes: Duration measured start→completion at month precision (day ignored; a year-only date is treated as January). Derived from the two dated status fields, not the unverified enrollment field (R-16).

141 trial(s) are undated or have an implausible negative duration (completion before start) and are grouped in an 'Unknown (undated)' bucket, kept for reconciliation and excluded from the duration bins.
Interpret study durations as a distribution over trial duration for pancreatic cancer interventional studies.

The chart title and encoding are apt, but the question asks for study durations and the spec is explicitly derived from start-to-completion dates; that framing is okay. However, the histogram buckets are discrete labeled bins rather than a continuous duration histogram, so a binned bar chart would be a more faithful encoding.
